Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: Victorian formal attire, halved black top hat, underarm holster
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: Early 20s male, pale ivory skin, short black hair, deep-set dark brown eyes, wearing a halved black top hat and formal suit with an underarm holster for a bronze-cylindered revolver.
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Claims to have lost recent memories (amnesia)
Klein Moretti.accessories: Cane, newspaper, revolver with wooden handle and bronze cylinder
Klein Moretti.role: Civilian staff at Blackthorn Security Company
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Describes his practice attire and specific weapon details (bronze cylinder, wooden handle).

Middle-aged Priest.primary_clothing: Black religious priest robes, simple and austere
Middle-aged Priest.face_description: Immobile and stark features, resembling a wax statue when standing in shadows.
Middle-aged Priest.visual_anchor: Middle-aged male priest in black robes, standing immobile like a wax statue in the shadows of a stone cathedral stairwell.
Middle-aged Priest.color_palette: Midnight black, shadow grey, cold stone
Middle-aged Priest.source_notes: Appears as a guard/guide at Saint Selena Cathedral; appearance described as wax-like.

Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: White shirt, black vest, black trench coat (hanging on stand)
Dunn Smith.face_description: A mature face with a slightly high hairline and deep, abstruse gray eyes. His expression is often calm, sometimes featuring a polite but unusual smile.
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: late 30s male, fair skin, short dark brown hair with a high receding hairline, deep gray eyes, wearing a black top hat and a knee-length black trench coat, holding a tobacco pipe
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: Enjoys smoking tobacco mixed with mint leaves
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Found in the scene where Klein meets him in his office.

Rozanne.primary_clothing: light green Loen-styled dress with beautiful laces on sleeves, collar, and chest
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s female, brown hair, light-brown eyes, bright forehead, wearing a light green Loen-style dress with white lace details.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.source_notes: Seen at the reception desk reading a magazine.

Mrs. Orianna.face_description: Refined and elegant face, clear and smiling eyes.
Mrs. Orianna.visual_anchor: 30s female, fair skin, black fashionable curly hair, clear green eyes, wearing a flounce lace dress.
Mrs. Orianna.source_notes: Appearance explicitly described in the chapter text when Klein meets her in the finance office.

Welch's Father.primary_clothing: High-quality Victorian gentleman's suit, charcoal grey with a silk cravat
Welch's Father.face_description: Stern and grieving countenance, sharp eyes, likely has a prominent nose and well-groomed features.
Welch's Father.visual_anchor: Wealthy middle-aged Victorian gentleman with a stern, grieving expression and well-tailored dark suit.
Welch's Father.color_palette: Dark charcoal, muted gold, deep brown
Welch's Father.source_notes: Mentioned by Dunn Smith as someone who might have hired a private investigator.

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: Linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: Resembles Klein but lacks the scholarly air, looks older than his actual age due to work stress.
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Explicitly stated age and appearance in his introductory scene this chapter.

Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: wears a tattered veil cap and carries a self-sewn bag
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage female, pale skin, long wavy black hair, wearing a simple, slightly worn Victorian dress
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions 'brown eyes' and 'shallow dimples'.
